stories.headline: Wildfires burn across UK as fire chiefs warn of extreme pressure
stories.description: Major incidents were declared in North Wales and in Glossop, Derbyshire in the Peak District on Sunday.

stories.headline: What is Iran’s Pickaxe Mountain, the mystery site Trump warns he’ll attack?
stories.description: Tensions escalate as the US president threatens to destroy Iran’s fortified nuclear site in the south of Tehran.

stories.headline: Argentina war vets urge focus on football for England World Cup semifinal
stories.description: One of sport’s great rivalries sees Argentina face England in an ever feisty encounter in the 2026 edition’s semifinal.

stories.headline: BBC documentary found spycams secretly filming women online
stories.description: What disturbed Jess the most was men sharing footage of wives, girlfriends and loved ones.

stories.headline: Seaton Carew sea death father named locally as Wayne Taylor
stories.description: A dad who died helping two children swimming at Seaton Carew beach is named locally as Wayne Taylor.
